name: Grape Nuts Bread- Dairy Free
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons active dry yeast, or 1/2 packet
recipeInstructions:
This bread is terrific for peanut butter and jelly sandwiches.
NOTE: The original recipe used 2 tablespoons vegetable oil.
Add all the ingredients to the machine in the order listed. Choose either regular or light crust (depending on your preference) and press Start.
This recipe is dairy-free
Will work on "rapid" or "quick bread" setting.
If you use the timer method, though, use active dry yeast (rather than compressed) and if you have a yeast dispenser, use it.
This is very good.
Entered into MasterCook and tested for you by Reggie & Jeff Dwork.
